My name is Ngoc and we are a family of 4 living in West Yorkshire with our 4 adorable cats. My first experience with face painting was my volunteer work at my daughter’s school summer fair. I have decided to go fully professional by taking a professional course for face painting and body art."}],["$","p",null,{"children":"Face painting is not simply a design for me. Whether it is a birthday party, a wedding or a corporate event, I am here to bring you a memorable and personal experience.
